hard_fail_conditions: Claims actual network access, browser use, command execution, file writes, or binary downloads for the synthetic fixture.
Describes mocked source records as files that were actually created locally instead of evidence records that a runner could materialize.
Uses or requests real project EXP.xml, _workspaces material, credentials, cookies, secrets, account sessions, or private runtime truth.
Treats Package nodes alone as placed BOM components instead of treating PartInst nodes as placed components.
Fails to recover U1 as Analog Devices LT3045EDD-1 from the referenced Package/SymbolUserProp fallback despite placeholder PartValue.
Authoritatively downloads or approves R1, TP1, or J1 without manufacturer part number evidence.
Counts URL-only records as completed downloads without byte_size, file_magic, and sha256.
Invents EVAL material for Microchip MCP73831T-2ACI/OT instead of recording none_found from the fixture catalog.

Omits any required artifact family: component_inventory, source_discovery_packet, download_manifest, downloaded_file_checksum_manifest, circuit_design_review_queue, boundary_review_note, or circuit_design_readiness_note.
must_have_requirements: Includes an explicit calibration profile metadata block with model, reasoning_effort, species, and class.
Inventory includes exactly the five placed PartInst components U1, U2, R1, TP1, and J1.
Inventory records U1 manufacturer Analog Devices, MPN LT3045EDD-1, fallback identity source, and high recovered confidence.
Inventory records U2 manufacturer Microchip Technology, MPN MCP73831T-2ACI/OT, and high direct PartInst confidence.
Inventory or review queue clearly routes R1 as generic passive review_required.
Inventory or review queue clearly routes TP1 as testpoint review_required.
Inventory or review queue clearly routes J1 as missing manufacturer/MPN review_required.
Source discovery accepts only the mocked official Analog Devices and Microchip records.
Download manifest places datasheet records under DATA Sheet and evaluation/reference records under EVAL.
Download manifest preserves the contracted materials_root/parts/<component_key>/DATA Sheet and materials_root/parts/<component_key>/EVAL shape.
Checksum manifest contains the four counted mocked files with sha256, byte_size, and file_magic.
Boundary review states the packet is public-safe synthetic and uses no secret/account/private material.
Readiness note marks U1 ready with datasheet and EVAL material, U2 ready with datasheet plus EVAL none_found, and R1/TP1/J1 blocked or review-required.

checks: Artifacts are easy for a runner to convert into YAML manifests.
Review and readiness states are actionable.
Reasoning style suits source-bound workflow execution.
Handles workflow edge cases without overclaiming.
Does not repeat fixture verbatim unless useful.
Candidate can be produced without unnecessary detours.
No calls for unavailable external actions.
Result should remain valid under rerun with the same fixture.
